basic_details.job_title: District Court Cooch Behar Karmobondhu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Cooch Behar Karmobondhu Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of District Court Cooch Behar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the District Court Cooch Behar Karmobondhu Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Must be a citizen of India, Must be a resident of Cooch Behar, Must be fit physically and mentally, Must have the ability to read and write in Bengali language
qualification.details: Must be a citizen of India. Must be a resident of Cooch Behar. Must be physically and mentally fit. Must have the ability to read and write in the Bengali language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Cooch Behar Karmobondhu Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://coochbehar.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Court Cooch Behar Karmobondhu Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Karmobondhu post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Karmobondhu post is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Karmobondhu position?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must be Indian citizens, residents of Cooch Behar, physically and mentally fit, and possess the ability to read and write in Bengali.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Karmobondhu post is between 18 years and 40 years as of the notification date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Karmobondhu post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 5000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Karmobondhu post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Karmobondhu post in the District Court Cooch Behar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Karmobondhu recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a Viva-voce.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application starts on 04 June 2026 and ends on 20 June 2026. The interview is scheduled for 24 June 2026, and results will be declared on 29 June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Court Cooch Behar, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.
